choose.when: AND NOW() >= a.start_date AND NOW() <= a.end_date

mapper.sql: a.id , CASE WHEN NOW() < a.start_date THEN 'wait' WHEN NOW() > a.end_date THEN 'close' ELSE 'active' END as status , a.name , a.content , a.image_pc_url , a.image_mobile_url , a.start_date , a.end_date , a.link_url , a.display_url , a.use_yn , a.target , a.sort , a.memo , a.create_date , a.create_id , a.modified_date , a.modified_id , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm , b.user_name , b.com_group
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_svc_popup a WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_svc_popup a left outer join tb_mbm_admin_user as b on a.create_id = b.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.sort ASC, a.id DESC, a.order_no ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_svc_popup a left outer join tb_mbm_admin_user as b on a.create_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_svc_popup ( name, content, image_pc_url, image_mobile_url, start_date, end_date, link_url, display_url, use_yn, target, sort, memo, create_id, modified_id ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{content}, #{imagePcUrl}, #{imageMobileUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{linkUrl}, #{displayUrl}, #{useYn}, #{target}, #{sort}, #{memo}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_svc_popup SET name = #{name}, content = #{content}, image_pc_url = #{imagePcUrl}, image_mobile_url = #{imageMobileUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, display_url = #{displayUrl}, use_yn = #{useYn}, target = #{target}, sort = #{sort}, memo = #{memo}, modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_svc_popup a left outer join tb_mbm_admin_user as b on a.create_id = b.id WHERE 1=1 AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() >= a.start_date AND NOW() <= a.end_date ORDER BY a.sort ASC, a.id DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_svc_popup a left outer join tb_mbm_admin_user as b on a.create_id = b.id WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND a.sort < #{currentSort} ORDER BY a.sort DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM tb_svc_popup a left outer join tb_mbm_admin_user as b on a.create_id = b.id WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND a.sort > #{currentSort} ORDER BY a.sort ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_svc_popup SET sort = #{sort}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_svc_popup a INNER JOIN ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC) as new_sort FROM tb_svc_popup WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ) b ON a.id = b.id SET a.sort = b.new_sort, a.modified_date = NOW() WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y'
